PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29th April, 2016 G.S.R. 468(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rule (2) of rule 4 of the Indian Police Service (Cadre) Rules, 1954, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Telangana, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Police Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, namely:─ 1. (1) These Regulations may be called the Indian Police Service (Fixation of cadre Strength) Third Amendment Regulations, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Police Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, in the schedule, for the heading “Telangana” and the entries occurring thereunder, the following shall be substituted PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training} NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29th April, 2016. G.S.R. 467(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Telangana hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Police Service (Pay) Rules, 2007, namely: - 1. (1) These rules may be called the Indian Police Service (Pay) Third Amendment Rules, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Police Service (Pay) Rules, 2007, in schedule II,– in Part A relating to posts carrying pay above the senior scale of pay of the Indian Police Service under the State Governments, in the table, for the entry “Telangana” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted namely:– “TELANGANA Director General of Police, (Head of Police Force) Rs.80000/-(fixed) Director General, ACB. HAG+ Rs.75500/- (annual increment @ 3%) 80,000/- Additional Director General of Police (Law & Order) HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Director, RBVRR, Telangana State Police Academy HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Commissioner of Police, Hyderabad City HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Additional Director General of Police, CID HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Additional Director General of Police, Intelligence HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Chairman, State Level Police Recruitment Board HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Inspector General of Police, Warangal Region/ North Zone PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, Hyderabad Region/ West Zone PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Commissioner of Police, Cyberabad PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Additional Commissioner of Police, Law & Order, Hyderabad PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Additional Commissioner of Police, Traffic, Hyderabad City PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Additional Commissioner of Police, Crimes & SIT, Hyderabad City PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police- CID, SCRB PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police- EOW/ Organised Crime PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, PCR, CID PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- -- 14 of 17 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 7 Inspector General of Police, Greyhounds PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, Telangana State Special Police PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police- Home Guards PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, Training PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, Communications and PCS & S PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, Provisioning & Logistics PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, Personnel PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- .
